1.title: Afghanistan
1.definition: Country to the east of Iran sharing a long desert border

2.title: Armenia
2.definition: Small Caucasus country bordering Iran in the northwest

3.title: Azerbaijan
3.definition: Country north of Iran along the Aras River

4.title: Iraq
4.definition: Western neighbor of Iran with the longest shared border

5.title: Pakistan
5.definition: Southeastern neighbor of Iran across the Balochistan region

6.title: Turkey
6.definition: Northwestern neighbor of Iran with a historic boundary

7.title: Turkmenistan
7.definition: Northeastern neighbor of Iran along the Kopet Dag mountains
